directive_work.directive_title: Design how operator-/decider-/integrity-routed tinker work actually reaches tinker (currently structurally invisible)

steps_addressed.step_1_design_options: Authored in PROP-060 under alternatives_considered[]. Four options compared: (a) reader-side Mode 0 scan mirroring assigned-analyst, (b) writer-side ban requiring directive writes, (c) graveyard sweep auto-promoting stale items to directives, (d) hybrid of a+c. Recommendation: option_a. Rationale: smallest change, mirrors known-working pattern, no writer-side coordination, preserves operator visibility. Counter-considerations addressed under PROP-060 counter_considerations[].
steps_addressed.step_2_prop_authored: PROP-060-tinker-mode-0-assigned-tinker-scan.json — proposed status. Includes alternatives_considered, counter_considerations, implementation_steps, implementation_pseudocode, edge_cases, idempotency_contract, verification_pattern, blast_radius, rollback_signal. Linked to PROP-029/PROP-030/PROP-048/PROP-026.
steps_addressed.step_3_drain_audit: Three currently-routed items audited (see findings FND-01 / FND-02 / FND-03 below).
steps_addressed.step_4_generalization: Confirmed defect class is tinker-specific. Only `assigned-analyst` and `assigned-tinker` are real routing status values across all agents. `assigned-analyst` has TWO working readers (analyst.md PROP-029 safety-net + analyst-baby.md PROP-034 baby-claim rule). `assigned-tinker` has zero. No other agent (curmudgeon, social, integrity) has unconsumed routing fields. See FND-04 below.

(However: the *cousin* defect — decider's action-typed HNOTE handler losing narrative HNOTEs — is structurally the same pattern but in a different agent. That is documented in DIRECTIVE-20260525-003's `structural_relationship_to_HNOTE_action_typed_handler` and is out of scope for this PROP. A follow-up to PROP-058 family is the right home for it.)
